title: The Parker E-ACT Academy (Northamptonshire): warning notice
body: "Notice relating to: The Parker E-ACT Academy  URN: 138235  Notice issued to: E-ACT Academy Trust  Reason for issue: ‘requires significant improvement’ Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Carol Gray  DfE regional director office: East Midlands  Local authority: West Northamptonshire  "

taxons.title: Inspection of maintained schools and academies
